header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.menu_desc: Turning Points: Simple Past with Irregular Verbs -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Key Moments -- Simple Past (Irregular Verbs)
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 7 -- Key Moments

listenings.text: Hi, I am Paulo, and I want to share the key moments of my career. In 2010 I got my first real job at a small company. Two years later, I made a big decision and left that job for a new challenge. I went to another city, and I became a junior manager there. The work was hard, but I took every chance to learn. In 2017 my team won an important award, and I found a new passion for leadership. Those moments changed everything. The lesson I learned is simple: every career has a few key moments, and you must be brave when they come.

Hello, my name is Lucia, and these are the turning points of my story. After university I got a job in a laboratory, but it was not my dream. One day I made a choice: I left the lab and went back to study. I became a teacher, and I found real joy in that work. A few years later, I took a leadership role at a big school. My team won a national prize for our project. Each key moment taught me something new. My advice is this: when a turning point comes, take it, because it can change your whole life.

extra_audio.text: First, she got her first job at a small company. Then she made a big decision and left for a new role. After that, she went to another city and became a manager. Her team won an important award that year. Finally, she found a new passion and took a leadership role.
